2606.24467.title: CompressKV: Semantic-Retrieval-Guided KV-Cache Compression for Resource-Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference
2606.24467.paper_summary: Long-context large language model (LLM) inference is increasingly constrained by the memory footprint and decoding cost of key-value (KV) caches, limiting sustainable deployment on resource-constrained hardware. Existing KV cache eviction methods typically apply heuristic token scoring over all heads in GQA-based LLMs. These methods ignore the different functionalities of attention heads, leading to the eviction of critical tokens and thus degrading the performance of LLMs. To address this issue, we propose CompressKV, a resource-efficient KV-cache compression framework for GQA-based LLMs. Instead of aggregating attention scores from all heads, CompressKV identifies Semantic Retrieval Heads (SRHs) that capture both the initial and final tokens of a prompt and semantically important mid-context evidence, and uses them to select tokens whose KV pairs should be retained. Furthermore, CompressKV allocates cache budgets across layers according to offline estimates of layer-wise eviction error. Experiments on LongBench and Needle-in-a-Haystack show that CompressKV consistently outperforms existing KV-cache eviction methods across memory budgets. Notably, it preserves over 97\% of full-cache performance using only 3\% of the KV cache on LongBench question-answering tasks and achieves 90\% accuracy with just 0.7\% KV storage on Needle-in-a-Haystack. These results demonstrate an improved resource--performance trade-off for long-context LLM inference. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/TUDa-HWAI/CompressKV
2606.24467.paper_summary_zh: 長文上下文的大型語言模型（LLM）推理越來越受到關鍵值（KV）快取的記憶體佔用和解碼成本的限制，這限制了在資源受限硬體上的可持續部署。現有的KV快取驅逐方法通常對基於GQA的LLM中的所有頭部應用啟發式的標記評分。這些方法忽略了注意力頭部的不同功能，導致關鍵標記的驅逐，從而降低了LLM的性能。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了CompressKV，一個資源高效的KV快取壓縮框架，用於基於GQA的LLM。CompressKV並不從所有頭部聚合注意力分數，而是識別出捕捉提示的初始和最終標記以及語義重要的中間上下文證據的語義檢索頭（SRHs），並利用它們來選擇應保留的KV對。進一步地，CompressKV根據層級驅逐誤差的離線估計在各層之間分配快取預算。在LongBench和Needle-in-a-Haystack上的實驗顯示，CompressKV在各種記憶體預算下始終優於現有的KV快取驅逐方法。值得注意的是，它在LongBench問答任務中僅使用3\%的KV快取就保留了超過97\%的全快取性能，並在Needle-in-a-Haystack上僅使用0.7\%的KV存儲就達到了90\%的準確率。這些結果展示了長上下文LLM推理的資源-性能權衡的改善。我們的代碼可在以下網址公開獲取：https://github.com/TUDa-HWAI/CompressKV
2606.24467.author: Xiaolin Lin et.al.
2606.24467.authors: Xiaolin Lin, Jingcun Wang, Olga Kondrateva, Yiyu Shi, Bing Li, Grace Li Zhang
